TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lavoy Allen == Kinwagaq nya ga 206cm ru kin'usuw nya ga 118kg, semong mzyuwi' mari sa NBA na Amirika. Kawas tay 1989 neng 2 gac 4nici mhtuw kya squw NewJersey na Amirika , spyang nya ki'an sa ppzyuwi' mari' ga pzyang balay kska' ruw pgleng te kska'. Trang mqwas raygak ga minluw squw Temple Uinversity. Maki sa kawas 2011 minsazing thwiru' mspung lga wal galun Philadelphia 76ers. ru minluw sa Philadelphia 76ers ru Indiana Pacers. minkirok sa ryax niya' mzyuwi' mari' kawas te 2011 mlu squ mwayaw sa giqas sinsyuw na NBA ga, wal tehuk squ hupa balay lalu na pzian mari. Ryax sa 1 nquw byacing te 2 na kawas te 2012 ga t'aring magal pingaga' niya' kya la, 15 tinsu' 'nagal niya' kya, ruw twangan 12 qnul niya' beh zik na yawa' uziy. pinspung tnsuqan na kawas te 2012 ga, minspung squw ubuy na Sayltik ga, tesazing qasa ga wal niya' balay siy psay kya quw pzyang niya kinbaqan kya ruq, wal nha'a slaqux kya quw sinngusan naha' qasa la. kawas te 2014lga wal naha' spbaziy squw Indiana Pacers la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == la*oj allen == kinwa…£aq nja …£a *** ¶~ ®m ru kin Ēus~…ēuw nja …£a ***k…£, s~…ēemoŇč mzjuwi Ē mari s~…ēa nő≤a na amirika. kawas~…ē taj **** neŇč * …£a ¶~ ® *ni ¶~ ®i mńßtuw kja s~…ēquw new*ers~…ēej na amirika , s~…ēpjaŇč nja ki Ēan s~…ēa ppzjuwi Ē mari Ē …£a pzjaŇč ő≤alaj ks~…ēka Ē ruw p…£leŇč te ks~…ēka Ē. traŇč mqwas~…ē raj…£ak …£a minluw s~…ēquw temple uin*ers~…ēitj. maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** mins~…ēaziŇč tńßwiru Ē ms~…ēpuŇč l…£a wal …£alun pńßila*elpńßia **ers~…ē. ru minluw s~…ēa pńßila*elpńßia **ers~…ē ru in*iana pa ¶~ ®ers~…ē. minkirok s~…ēa rjax nija Ē mzjuwi Ē mari Ē kawas~…ē te **** mlu s~…ēqu mwajaw s~…ēa …£iqas~…ē s~…ēins~…ējuw na nő≤a …£a, wal teńßuk s~…ēqu ńßupa ő≤alaj lalu na pzian mari. rjax s~…ēa * nquw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * na kawas~…ē te **** …£a t ĒariŇč ma…£al piŇča…£a Ē nija Ē kja la, ** tins~…ēu Ē Ēna…£al nija Ē kja, ruw twaŇčan ** qnul nija Ē ő≤eńß zik na jawa Ē uzij. pins~…ēpuŇč tns~…ēuqan na kawas~…ē te **** …£a, mins~…ēpuŇč s~…ēquw uő≤uj na s~…ēajltik …£a, tes~…ēaziŇč qas~…ēa …£a wal nija Ē ő≤alaj s~…ēij ps~…ēaj kja quw pzjaŇč nija kinő≤aqan kja ruq, wal nńßa Ēa s~…ēlaqux kja quw s~…ēinŇčus~…ēan nańßa Ē qas~…ēa la. kawas~…ē te ****l…£a wal nańßa Ē s~…ēpő≤azij s~…ēquw in*iana pa ¶~ ®ers~…ē la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Lavoy Allen == Kinwagaq nya ga 206cm ru kin'usuw nya ga 118kg, semong mzyuwi' mari sa NBA na Amirika. Kawas tay 1989 neng 2 gac 4nici mhtuw kya squw NewJersey na Amirika , spyang nya ki'an sa ppzyuwi' mari' ga pzyang balay kska' ruw pgleng te kska'. Trang mqwas raygak ga minluw squw Temple Uinversity. Maki sa kawas 2011 minsazing thwiru' mspung lga wal galun Philadelphia 76ers. ru minluw sa Philadelphia 76ers ru Indiana Pacers. minkirok sa ryax niya' mzyuwi' mari' kawas te 2011 mlu squ mwayaw sa giqas sinsyuw na NBA ga, wal tehuk squ hupa balay lalu na pzian mari. Ryax sa 1 nquw byacing te 2 na kawas te 2012 ga t'aring magal pingaga' niya' kya la, 15 tinsu' 'nagal niya' kya, ruw twangan 12 qnul niya' beh zik na yawa' uziy. pinspung tnsuqan na kawas te 2012 ga, minspung squw ubuy na Sayltik ga, tesazing qasa ga wal niya' balay siy psay kya quw pzyang niya kinbaqan kya ruq, wal nha'a slaqux kya quw sinngusan naha' qasa la. kawas te 2014lga wal naha' spbaziy squw Indiana Pacers la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
